result.reasoning: Describes an action performed by HRBP to send a feedback form.
Specifies a required action (submission of the form) by the employee and Hiring Manager.
Begins with "If" and defines a conditional branch to send a reminder.
States an activity that the Hiring Manager must carry out (conduct a meeting).
Conditional clause "If ... indicates performance concerns" leading to a choice of actions.
Uses "If" to define a branch where HRBP marks the checklist as complete.
Describes the action of archiving documents by HRBP.
Specifies the action of sending a completion email and concluding the process.
